title: Add Proxy Links Page

requirements.text: Add a new 'Proxy' page accessible from the sidebar navigation (alongside Home, Games, AI, Code, Quick Open, Education). The page must list the three proxy services used by the app: 1) ProxySite — https://www.proxysite.com, 2) ProxyOrb — https://proxyorb.com, and 3) ProxyProxy (primary/most-used) — https://proxyproxy.net/?__cpo=aHR0cHM6Ly9jaGVldGFoMTItNGV2LmNhZmZlaW5lLnh5eg#caffeineAdminToken=4e5885a0f3111a08883c7259d557d207cdc0e8c8ef2349289317f3bbf1bb43b2. The primary proxy must be visually distinguished (e.g., a 'Primary' badge or highlighted card). Each proxy card must include a launch/open button that navigates to the proxy URL in the app's existing proxy tab system.

quotes: make a page with the proxy we use 1, https://www.proxysite.com 2, https://proxyorb.com and the proxy we mostly aand are using right now https://proxyproxy.net/?__cpo=aHR0cHM6Ly9jaGVldGFoMTItNGV2LmNhZmZlaW5lLnh5eg#caffeineAdminToken=4e5885a0f3111a08883c7259d557d207cdc0e8c8ef2349289317f3bbf1bb43b2

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Proxy' navigation entry appears in the sidebar alongside existing page links.
The Proxy page displays three cards: ProxySite, ProxyOrb, and ProxyProxy.
ProxyProxy card is visually marked as the primary/most-used proxy (e.g., 'Primary' badge, highlighted border).
Each card shows the proxy name, its URL (can be truncated for display), and a launch button.
Clicking the launch button on any card opens that proxy's URL through the app's existing tab/proxy navigation system.
The page styling is consistent with the existing amethyst/purple dark theme.

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any file under frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve all three proxy URLs exactly as provided, including the full query string and token fragment for the primary proxy.
Use the existing tab/proxy navigation mechanism from useTabs.ts to open proxy URLs.
nonGoals: Do not add backend functionality — this is a purely frontend page.
Do not embed the proxy sites in iframes on this page; only provide launch buttons.
Do not remove or modify any existing pages or navigation items.
